# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deployment Pipeline
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Setup Go
        uses: go-gitea/action-go@master
        with:
          goVersion: 1.16
      - name: Build Artifacts
        run: go build -o main . && docker build -t myapp .

  download_and_deploy:
    name: Download and Deploy Artifacts
    needs: [build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Checkout Dependencies
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          repository: dependency-repo-url
      - name: Use Artifacts from Previous Job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        id: downloaded_build
      - name: Extract Downloaded Artifact
        run: tar -xf ${{ steps.downloaded_build.outputs.downloadArtifact }} -C .
      - name: Run Deployment Scripts
        run: ./main > deployment-output.log
